svg.title: Worker Scalability & Session Telemetry Compute Flow
svg.desc: Comprehensive view of the asynchronous worker architecture, queue topology, and the highly detailed session telemetry compute and caching lifecycle.
svg.text: Decoupled asynchronous processing separated by durable queues, strict dispatch boundaries, and granular resource controls.

g.text: DLQ for poison pills + Stale Lock Reapers
Redis SET NX PX distributed locks
Inferred external triggers for K8s HPA / ECS

svg.text: End-to-end exact execution sequence showing trigger, durable queueing, bounded in-process concurrency, caching, and stale refresh.

g.text: Pulls job based on concurrency limit
In-process AsyncSemaphore to prevent node overload
Atomic PostgreSQL lease to prevent redundant computes
Aggregate raw samples into window resolutions (1m, 5m)
Upsert JSONB blob tagged with sourceWatermark
